ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The First Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-02-2020 Continued To Apr-13-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Bryn Rohde-Davies for and with Alexandra Afanasieff.

Ms. Rohde-Davies stated she was given additional time of April 13th for filing date and that both conservatorship and trust accountings will be prepared before April 13th.

The status on filing 1st account is continued to April 13, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The First Accounting
Off Calendar Jan-13-2020 Continued To Mar-02-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bryn Rohde-Davies for and with Alexandra Afanasieff.

Ms. Rohde-Davies stated that she got the days mixed up, that she is asking that the Trustee be un-suspended, that the Conservatee is deceased now and that she filed a notice of Conservatee's death. Mr. Rohde-Davies also stated that the information has been provided to the accounting preparer, that they are waiting on receiving the accounting and now need to file a petition for distribution, that they need to do the Decedent's taxes and asked for a three-month continuance. The Court re-instated Ms. Afanasieff as Trustee. Status on filing of the first account is continued to March 2, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The accounting period is extended to December 31, 2019 at Counsel's request. The orders to appear are off calendar.

Judge: Cecilia P. Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The First Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-09-2019 Continued To Jan-13-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that this is the 3rd calling of the case with one Court continuance. The Trustee is suspended. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Trustee and the Attorney to appear on January 13, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the first account has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
